input:
Score this tool description:

**check_pitfalls**: Check for known pitfalls before starting work. Returns 3-5 specific warnings for your tech stack. ~500 tokens. Call once at session start.
description: Check for known pitfalls before starting work. Returns 3-5 specific warnings for your tech stack. ~500 tokens. Call once at session start.
rationale: This is the reference 5/5 example from the rubric itself. Output shape (3-5 warnings), cost signal (~500 tokens), trigger (session start, once), specificity (pitfalls for your tech stack), differentiation (no other tool says 'pitfalls at session start').
